description: An auditor tests controls related to the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS).

nodes.task_description: Review the network diagram to ensure the systems that store or process credit card data are properly segmented from the rest of the network.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms the cardholder data environment (CDE) is properly isolated.

nodes.task_description: Scan a sample of databases to ensure that full credit card numbers are not being stored.

expected_outcome.value: The scan confirms that only the last four digits of credit card numbers are stored.

nodes.task_description: Review firewall rules to ensure that all traffic into and out of the CDE is restricted to only what is necessary.

expected_outcome.value: The auditor confirms the firewall rules are appropriately restrictive.
